title: Slashes and underscore
description: / for paths and division, \ for escapes, _ for code/file names
tips: / is right pinky bottom row (no Shift)
\ is right pinky top-right (between ] and Enter, no Shift)
Common in file paths, code, technical writing

character_tips.anna: Slashes for paths and division. Underscore for variable names.
character_tips.maxim: Tech-essential symbols. File paths, escapes, snake_case naming.
character_tips.klavochka: Like little roads in code — / leads somewhere! 💖
